name: Module authors
description: Provide subject expertise and written content. Carry out interviews, feature in filmed content and identify additional academic contributors. Design assessment and submit to External Examiner for approval.

name: Tutor
description: Can deliver wbsLive sessions, monitor and respond to online student activities.

name: TLC/LDO
description: Teaching and Learning Consultants and Learning Design Officers review and advise on written and filmed content, advise on appropriate interactive activities, support filming and liaise with publishing and multimedia teams. Provide training.

name: Course directors
description: Sign off on module and will inform changes/updates to GLOMBA.

name: Media team
description: Film and edit video footage, advise on video content types, create animations.

name: Publishing team
description: Create online content, edit and proof-read final versions, produce subtitles and transcripts.

name: Programme team
description: Manage the administrative aspects of the programme, such as assessment deadlines and interactions with students.

name: SmartStage team
description: Manage and operate an augmented reality digital stage with virtual environments. Provide technical expertise for live online sessions, support the setup and delivery of content on the stage and advise on effective use of its features.
